scripts.lint: pnpm exec biome lint apps/client packages && cd apps/cli && python3 -m ruff check src tests
scripts.format: pnpm exec biome format --write apps/client packages && cd apps/cli && python3 -m ruff format src tests
scripts.test: pnpm build:contracts && pnpm --filter @concentray/client test && cd apps/cli && python3 -m pytest -q
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
